name: Shatter
summary: Shatter damages or destroys a brittle object.
description: Bundled DFS fallback for Shatter so QuickDeck can show popup text for DFS50 actor references.
notes: When actor reference is DFS50, this entry should be preferred over generic Magic if both exist.

name: Weaken
summary: Weaken temporarily reduces the subject's structural or physical strength.
description: Bundled DFS fallback for Weaken so QuickDeck can show popup text for DFS50 actor references.
notes: When actor reference is DFS50, this entry should be preferred over generic Magic if both exist.
